notes:
• One citation model for everyone: exhibits cite by their number, submissions by page and paragraph — whether you act as counsel or sit as arbitrator.
• Arbitrator mode never renumbers: the parties’ exhibit numbers and types are adopted on import and stay untouched.
• Share a matter with your co-arbitrators: File ▸ Share Matter writes one portable archive; they add it via File ▸ Import Shared Matter.
